metadata.name: Basalt
metadata.title: Basalt Laser Cleaning Settings
metadata.description: Detailed machine settings, parameter relationships, diagnostic procedures, and troubleshooting guides for optimizing basalt laser cleaning operations.

author.name: Yi-Chun Lin
author.title: Ph.D.
credentials: Ph.D. Materials Engineering, National Taiwan University, 2018
Post-Ph.D. fellowship at TSMC's laser fab lab, 2018-2020
Assisted in projects on ultrafast laser applications
